text.title: langchain-observability Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are runtime drivers (latency_target_ms, cost_cap_per_turn_usd, pii_posture) all present?

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND pii_posture != 'no-export' AND latency_target_ms <= 500
profile.valid == true AND pii_posture != 'no-export' AND latency_target_ms > 500 AND cost_cap_per_turn_usd <= 0.01
profile.valid == true AND pii_posture != 'no-export' AND latency_target_ms > 500 AND cost_cap_per_turn_usd > 0.01
